# Iceberg Lakehouse
> The technical reference for Apache Iceberg and lakehouse catalogs.

## Top Guides
- [Apache Iceberg Masterclass](https://iceberglakehouse.com/posts/2026-04-29-iceberg-masterclass-01/): Comprehensive Iceberg tutorial series
- [Iceberg v3 Deletion Vectors](https://iceberglakehouse.com/posts/iceberg-v3-deletion-vectors-snowflake-dml/): Understanding Iceberg v3 features
- [Iceberg Partition Evolution](https://iceberglakehouse.com/posts/iceberg-partition-evolution-compaction/): Partition strategies and compaction
- [Iceberg REST Catalog](https://iceberglakehouse.com/posts/2025-10-Building-Universal-Lakehouse-Catalog/): Building a universal catalog
- [Choosing an Iceberg Control Plane](https://iceberglakehouse.com/posts/2026-05-24-choosing-iceberg-control-plane/): Catalog comparison guide
- [Query Engine Comparison](https://iceberglakehouse.com/posts/2026-04-29-query-engine-01/): Dremio, Trino, Spark, DuckDB, Athena
- [Iceberg with Spark DML](https://iceberglakehouse.com/posts/2026-05-22-apache-iceberg-spark-dml-evolution/): DML operations with Spark
- [Data Lakehouse Catalogs Overview](https://iceberglakehouse.com/posts/2025-10-exploring-commerical-apache-iceberg-catalogs/): Commercial catalog landscape
- [Iceberg Resources Directory](https://iceberglakehouse.com/posts/2024-10-ultimate-directory-of-Apache-Iceberg-Resources/): Complete resource list
- [Agentic Lakehouse Architecture](https://iceberglakehouse.com/posts/2026-05-23-single-node-data-engineering-duckdb-datafusion-polars-lakesail/): Modern data stack overview
